Name: LPUPS Case Panel
Author: LPUPS
Description: LattePanda UPS monitoring and control — battery status, power draw, network toggle, and system diagnostics.

Actions.Name: Battery Status
Actions.Tooltip: B1 (18650 UPS) and B2 (12V LiON pack) capacity, state, and charging indicator.

Actions.Name: Power and Runtime
Actions.Tooltip: Live power draw in Watts and estimated minutes remaining on the 12V pack.

Actions.Name: Network Mode
Actions.Tooltip: Toggle between WiFi-first and Cellular-first priority. Both adapters stay active.

Actions.Name: UPS Events
Actions.Tooltip: Last event from the Arduino UPS (charger connected/disconnected, kick-in, shutdown trigger).

Actions.Name: System Control
Actions.Tooltip: Tap to initiate shutdown (with confirm). Hold 3s to restart.

Actions.Name: Get Help
Actions.Tooltip: Run 15 system sanity checks. Shows pass/warn/fail summary. Press again to open detail report.
